title: ADK-202: Prompt Engineering & Custom System Instructions
author: Google Cloud
description: Write structured instructions, few-shot examples, dynamic templates, and safety rules to guide agent reasoning behavior.

features.title: System Instructions
features.description: Inject operational guidelines that enforce tone, rules, and task execution constraints.

features.title: Few-shot Prompts
features.description: Embed historical samples directly in prompts to teach the agent complex multi-step reasoning.

features.title: Prompt Protection
features.description: Detect and deflect user injection threats that try to leak files or override agent constraints.
